title: capsella tenerescens
intro: Capsella tenerescens, also known as small shear grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is also said to have health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and promoting digestion. Capsella tenerescens can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use and effectiveness have not been extensively scientifically studied.
